summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Ray Optics and Optical Instruments in physics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 12 physics explains the core concepts of Ray Optics and Optical Instruments. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
